title: Image Processing Path
description: Build fluency in Image Processing inside Computer Vision by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Instance Segmentation
steps.summary: The process of identifying and segmenting individual instances of objects within an image. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Segmentation. It opens into AI in Instance Segmentation and Instance Segmentation Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Image Segmentation
steps.summary: The process of dividing an image into its constituent parts or objects. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Segmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Semantic Segmentation
steps.summary: Semantic Segmentation belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Segmentation and Semantic Network. It opens into semantic segmentation with BEiT and 3D semantic segmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Tiny-ViT
steps.summary: Tiny-ViT belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after ViT. It opens into Tiny-ViT-5M and Tiny-ViT-11M.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Panoptic Segmentation
steps.summary: Panoptic Segmentation belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Segmentation. It opens into AI in Panoptic Segmentation and panoptic segmentation with UPSNet.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Cycle Consistency Techniques
steps.summary: Cycle Consistency Techniques belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Cycle Consistency. It opens into Cycle Consistency Techniques Extensions and Cycle Consistency Techniques Extensions Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: panoptic segmentation with Panoptic DeepLab
steps.summary: panoptic segmentation with Panoptic DeepLab belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after Panoptic-DeepLab and Panoptic Segmentation. It opens into panoptic segmentation with MaX-DeepLab.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Masked Autoencoder ViT-Lite (MAE-Lite)
steps.summary: Masked Autoencoder ViT-Lite (MAE-Lite) belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML, within Image Processing. It sits inside Computer Vision / Image Processing. Start after ViT and MAE Masked Autoencoder.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
